responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! Feel free to ask me anything about the college.
Hey! I'm here to assist you with your queries.
Goodbye! Have a nice day!
See you later! Feel free to come back if you have more questions.
You're welcome! Have a great day ahead.
Admissions usually start in June. You can apply online through our official website. Eligibility varies by course - please check the specific course details.
The admission process involves filling an online application form, appearing for an entrance exam (if required), and a personal interview. Visit our admissions portal for more details.
We offer various UG and PG courses including B.Tech, BBA, B.Com, MBA, M.Tech, and PhD programs in multiple specializations.
Our college provides courses in Engineering (CSE, ECE, ME, CE), Management, Commerce, and Science streams at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels.
The fee structure varies by course. B.Tech fees are approximately ₹1,20,000 per year, MBA fees are ₹2,00,000 per year. Hostel fees are ₹80,000 per year including mess.
Please visit our official website for detailed fee structure. We also offer scholarships based on merit and financial need.
Yes, we have separate boys' and girls' hostels with 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, mess facilities, and recreational areas. Hostel accommodation is optional.
Our hostels are well-equipped with all modern amenities. You can apply for hostel during admission.
Our college has excellent placement records. Top companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Microsoft visit our campus. Average package is ₹6-8 LPA, highest package goes up to ₹25 LPA.
We have a dedicated placement cell that provides training and placement assistance. Many students get placed in reputed companies every year.
We offer merit-based scholarships, government scholarships, and need-based financial aid. Merit scholarships are given to students with excellent academic records.
Various scholarship schemes are available. Please check the scholarship section on our website or contact the admissions office.
Yes, we provide bus facilities from major locations in the city. There are multiple bus routes. Transport fees are ₹15,000 per year.
Our college is well-connected by buses. We have a fleet of buses covering all major areas. The transport facility is safe and reliable.
Exams are conducted as per the university schedule. Mid-sem exams are in October and March. End-sem exams are in December and May.
Please check the exam portal for detailed schedule and syllabus. Results are declared within 4-6 weeks after exams.
College timings are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. Specific class timetables are available on the student portal.
Classes start at 9 AM. Each department has its own timetable. You can check your timetable on the college website or notice board.
Our faculty members are highly qualified and experienced. Most have PhDs from reputed institutions. They are dedicated to teaching and research.
We have an excellent team of faculty members who are experts in their fields. They provide quality education and mentorship.
Yes, we have a well-stocked library with thousands of books, journals, and digital resources. Library is open from 8 AM to 8 PM.
Our library is a treasure trove of knowledge. It has a vast collection of books, e-books, research papers, and magazines.
Our campus is spread over 50 acres with state-of-the-art infrastructure. We have well-equipped labs, sports complex, canteen, auditorium, and much more.
The campus is eco-friendly and beautiful. We have all modern facilities including smart classrooms, computer labs, and sports facilities.
